name: Chocolate-Chip Cookie Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 Square unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flours, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Toss the chocolate chips with 1 tablespoon of the dry ingredients.
3. Cream the butter and sugar, beating for 3 minutes.
4. Beat in the eggs, melted chocolate, and vanilla.
5. Add the sifted mixture alternately with the half-and-half, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Stir in the chocolate chips and pecans.
6. Divide the batter among buttered and floured muffin tins.
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for 20 minutes, until a wooden pick in the center emerges clean and dry.
8. Cool and remove from pans. Makes 18 muffins.
